contract_binding_policy.canonical_contract: Every adopted row stores operationId, method/path, parameters, request body, response status/body, required/nullability, and array item/minItems/maxItems constraints from the pinned OpenAPI bytes.
contract_binding_policy.source: Every row binds and audits the actual client method block, canonical operation label, strict transport helper/status, all canonical request paths except explicit field exclusions, and the public response model declaration.
contract_binding_policy.mock: Every row binds an actual TCP server route and handler; closed rows additionally require successful shared Paper/mock network scenario evidence.
contract_binding_policy.pending: Pending rows may have contract-bound source, mock, and compiled network scenarios, but retain empty verified targets and are never counted as closed until the same scenario succeeds against Paper and mock.

contract_exceptions.reason: IPO-indication-only replace notional is outside the adopted implementation scope

validation.reason: Paper requires an expiration-day long option position; raw Paper and mock validation succeeded, but the corrected liquid-contract Paper scenario still requires a clean account and complete cleanup

observed_contract_deviations.reason: Paper returns a JSON exercise-details object with HTTP 200 while the canonical OpenAPI declares an empty 200 response
